title: Tool call results not showing after checkmark on --continue
description: On --continue replay, messages after bash/tool calls only show the checkmark, not the result content that follows. The collapsed tool display may be suppressing content that should be visible, or the replay path is not rendering post-tool-call agent text.

logs.msg: Fixed: set tools_expanded=true before message rebuild in load_session. Tool results now show full content on --continue, Ctrl+O still toggles.
Reverted: collapsed display is correct. The original issue was agent text cutoff (tk-nx0j), not tool result collapsing. Reassigning to tk-nx0j.
